title: ModelPointers
description: Pointer file at courses/<slug>/models/_pointers.json that names the currently-promoted model_id for a LibV2 course and records the promotion/demotion history. Wave 93 (slm-training-2026-04-26).

current.description: Currently-promoted model_id (kebab-case shape from model_card.schema.json::model_id), or null when no model has been promoted yet for this course.

history.description: Append-only log of promotion/demotion events. Each entry records when a model_id became current and (when superseded) when it was demoted. The most-recent entry whose demoted_at is null mirrors the value in 'current'.

model_id.description: The model_id this history event refers to.

promoted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the model_id became current.

promoted_by.description: Optional actor identifier (CLI user, automation tag, etc.).

demoted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the model_id was superseded by another. Null while still current.
